::: center
![](images/Faculty_logo.png){height=3cm}
![](images/UWC-logo.jpg){height=4cm}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
```{=markdown}
::: {.toc}
:::
```

# BCB744 Biostatistics {.unnumbered}
:::

# Preface {.unnumbered}

This book assembles the Biostatistics chapters from the BCB744 website into a single PDF edition for students who prefer long-form offline reading.

The website remains the primary format for the module. It is the most current version, it supports internal navigation and linked resources, and it is where ongoing revisions appear first. This PDF book is a companion edition generated from the same Quarto chapter sources.

The collected volume follows the same chapter sequence used on the website. The taught core material appears first, followed by the extended reading chapters that develop the same framework into more advanced model-based topics.

# Using This Book {.unnumbered}

Use this PDF when you want a continuous reading copy of the material, but rely on the website for the latest edits, assessment links, and any web-specific navigation.
